name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceProbeMap expands powered hover surface impingement into rotor-resolved local probe points.
note: Primary audit surface for rotor-resolved A4MC hover surface probes.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies per-rotor disk center axis open area pressure jump and thrust.
note: Rotor source geometry input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_impingement
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceImpingement supplies aggregate ground and ceiling reaction targets for these probes.
note: Aggregate surface target input.

name: surface_nearfield_calibration
value: SurfaceNearfieldCalibration supplies the JIRS ground and ceiling curve multipliers reused by every rotor probe.
note: Surface curve input.

name: jirs2024_surface_effect
value: JIRS 2024 surface effect data anchors the ground and ceiling curve fits used by the probe map.
note: Experimental surface-effect reference.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for live rotor-resolved surface pressure and wake-speed probes.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
